title: Starbolt
description: Starbolt is just another simplistic FPS pack that is meant to be stable but beautiful.
body:
Are you tired of laggy gameplay and frame drops in Minecraft? Starbolt is here to supercharge your experience! Designed as a lightweight and easy-to-use solution, this modpack focuses on maximizing FPS while maintaining the vanilla feel of the game.

Whether you're exploring vast biomes, fighting mobs, or building your dream base, Starbolt ensures smooth performance without sacrificing simplicity. Perfect for low-end PCs or players who just want a better Minecraft experience.
